dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Finally, I made it to the island. Let me try reach command.

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp tries her comms device

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Command, hello? Can you hear me? This is Merzp from the expedition crew, do you copy? Over.

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: At last, a voice finally breaks through

dialogueItems.name: Someone Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: Merzp is that you? Its Aldrich. Are you alright? Over.

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: A sigh of relief is finally released

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Thank Zipt I got through, I need help here Aldrich. Over.

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: Do you have any idea where you might be Merzp? Did you activate your ships built in tracker for us to track and locate you?

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp Lowers her voice

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: I may or may not have torn my ship apart to get to shore to get a better reception and out of the toxic water...

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: What?! Wait did you say toxic water?

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Yes, why do you ask commander?

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: If you can build a tracker from whatever is left from your ship, we could use the faint ping in whatever system you are in and scan planets for toxic water and rescue you!

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp screams with joy

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: That could work, I can see some parts lying around, that broke off when my ship was crashing, whI think I can make something work.

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: Well get on with it Merzp I will get a rescue team together for you and I wish you the strength of a hundred bleffens. Over.

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Thank you Commander, I hope to see you soon. Over.

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: The transmission ends and Merzp looks around

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: I am on a deserted planet and I think something is watching me…

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp turns around to see a zombified being unknown to her

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: What in the threngs are you?!

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Before Merzp could respond, the zombie lunges at her

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Woah!

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp dodges out of the way and the zombie seems to continue on some kind of path

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Woah, that's strange that it only attacked me when I was in its way. I should probably avoid those weird throgs.

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: I just need to get six more pieces of my ship in order to build a tracker.

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: And I think I see the first piece in front of me.
